creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to pascal.guitierrez from comment #2)
Emm, igb(4) has been converted to use iflib(4). It seems that the iflib implementation does not report statistics of output dropped packets ( IFCOUNTER_OQDROPS ).

May you please have a look at the driver statistics report from sysctl ? I do not have igb(4) devices but have em(4) which use the same driver e1000 with igb(4). For em(4) the statistics report for dropped packets are 
```
# sysctl dev.em.0.iflib | grep r_drops
dev.em.0.iflib.txq0.r_drops: 8402780
```

For igb(4) I guess they should be
```
# sysctl dev.igb.0.iflib | grep r_drops
```
